searchText.title: Search Text
searchText.description: Optional substring to filter specialty name. Leave blank to list every specialty.

healthcareFacilityId.title: Healthcare Facility Id (optional)
healthcareFacilityId.description: When the user asks what specialties are offered at a specific facility (e.g. "what departments at Onco Global - Bengaluru HSR"), pass the HealthcareFacility Id obtained from Find Cancer Care Facilities plannerReferenceText. Results will be scoped to specialties actually staffed by active practitioners at that facility. Do not accept a facility Id from the user.

facilityName.title: Facility Name (optional)
facilityName.description: If you do not yet have a HealthcareFacility Id, pass a distinctive name substring the user typed (e.g. "HSR" or "Bengaluru Whitefield"). Used only when it resolves to exactly one facility; otherwise the tool falls back to the global catalog. Prefer passing healthcareFacilityId when available.
